creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Add entry for PowerDNS DoS vulnerability

If this is not the way to add entries to vuxml I'm willing to learn how. I've read the docs on http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/security-notify.html but that doesn't explain how to actually submit it.

Port maintainer (secteam@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
